UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores user-specific settings and profile information.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user.

WatchlistItem.title: Watchlist Item
WatchlistItem.description: A stock symbol added to a user's watchlist.

name.description: The full name of the company.

addedAt.description: When the stock was added to the watchlist.

/users/{userId}/watchlist/{symbol}.description: Subcollection of stocks in a user's watchlist.
